title: 18-Karat Gold
body: The karat parts are by mass, not volume. Assume that this is a simple mixture having an average density equal to the weighted densities of its constituents. The densities are gold $$19.32$$ $$\frac{g}{{cm}^3}$$, silver $$10.49$$ $$\frac{g}{{cm}^3}$$, and copper $$8.96$$ $$\frac{g}{{cm}^3}$$.
